    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class gui.MainWindow
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class test.Test
     
    MainWindow - Class in gui
    Main application frame that orchestrates the subpanels and connects UI events to the controller.
    MainWindow() - Constructor for class gui.MainWindow
     
    MEAS - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.DisplayPage
     
    Measurement - Class in lcr.beans
    Immutable object representing a single pair of readings from the LCR meter.
    Measurement(double, double) - Constructor for class lcr.beans.Measurement
    Constructs a measurement point with primary and secondary values.
    MeasurementBusiness - Class in lcr.business
    Background worker thread responsible for continuously polling measurement data from the LCR meter, performing metric conversions, and executing periodic hardware configuration syncs.
    MeasurementBusiness(MeterBusiness, ConfigBusiness, Object) - Constructor for class lcr.business.MeasurementBusiness
    Constructs the measurement controller loop instance.
    MeasurementDTO - Class in lcr.beans
    Data Transfer Object that encapsulates raw readings, parsed measurement values, and their derived components (resistance, capacitance, inductance, impedance).
    MeasurementDTO(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, SeriesMode, Boolean, Map, Map, Map, Map) - Constructor for class lcr.beans.MeasurementDTO
    Constructs a complete measurement data transfer object.
    MeasurementObserver - Interface in lcr.observer
    Observer interface defining the lifecycle callbacks for dispatching instrument telemetry updates, hardware configuration shifts, and connection tear-down events to listening UI presentation components.
    MeasurementPanel - Class in gui
    UI panel for displaying real-time primary and secondary LCR measurements.
    MeasurementPanel() - Constructor for class gui.MeasurementPanel
     
    MED - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.Aperture
     
    meter - Variable in class lcr.business.MeterBusiness
     
    meterBusiness - Variable in class lcr.controller.MeterController
     
    MeterBusiness - Class in lcr.business
    Factory and coordinator class responsible for initializing, selecting, and establishing connections to different supported LCR meter hardware models.
    MeterBusiness() - Constructor for class lcr.business.MeterBusiness
     
    meterController - Variable in class lcr.view.RealTimeChartPanel
    Active bridge instance driving business layer translations.
    MeterController - Class in lcr.controller
    Main application controller coordinating UI user interactions from the view layer and driving async transactional updates to the underlying LCR meter hardware.
    MeterController(MeterView) - Constructor for class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Constructs the controller core, mapping business services and attaching the target view component as a measurement lifecycle observer.
    MeterView - Interface in lcr.view
    View interface defining the presentation layer contract for the LCR meter instrument, handling real-time connection telemetry and operational hardware configurations.
    MV0 - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.Voltage
     
    MV100 - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.BiasVoltage
     
    MV100 - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.Voltage
     
    MV200 - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.BiasVoltage
     
    MV300 - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.BiasVoltage
     
    MV300 - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.Voltage
     
    MV500 - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.BiasVoltage
     
    MV600 - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.Voltage
